# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-config
  namespace: linkerd
data:
  config.yaml: |-
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-server-config
  namespace: linkerd
data:
  config.yaml: |-
    server:
      requireIdentityOnInboundPorts: [443]
      requireAuthorizationForPorts: [443]

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: linkerd
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: linkerd
